title: WorkCanvas and project management (upcoming community session)

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
We asked what you want to learn new about WorkCanvas and many of our community members said they wanted to better understand how to use WorkCanvas as part of their project management process.

In this session, Guy, monday WorkCanvas co-founder, will discuss key features, share best practices, and demonstrate the practical applications of WorkCanvas for project management, including workflow optimization, team collaboration, and innovative visualization techniques. As always, you can also ask Guy your WorkCanvas questions.

Do you have specific questions or scenarios you’d like Guy to address? Submit them below!

Webinar Registration - Zoom.
